name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BUG-3
title: spec.md changes made by rabbit-spec are never committed during TDD cycle
description:
After rabbit-spec (Step 3) edits spec.md locally, nothing in the workflow commits those changes. The TDD subagent TEST-WRITE step stages only the test directory, IMPLEMENT stages implementation files, and tdd-step.py transitions commit only feature.json. The spec.md edits fall through uncommitted and remain as working-tree noise after the PR is merged.

Observed: after merging PR #94 (retroactive TDD governance), git status shows spec.md and feature.json modified but unstaged for both tdd-subagent and rabbit-spec features.

Fix: rabbit-feature-touch dispatcher should commit the spec.md changes immediately after rabbit-spec returns at Step 3, before dispatching the subagent at Step 5. Suggested commit format: spec(feature): update spec for request-summary. This ensures the branch always has spec changes committed, the TDD subagent reads a clean committed diff, and the spec is never silently dropped from the PR.

Affected: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md Step 3 instruction, tdd-subagent spec workflow contract.

history.note: Fixed by PR #99: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md Step 3 now commits spec.md after rabbit-spec returns. Inv 16 + test coverage.
